title: Rififi in Tokyo
writer: Auguste Le Breton, José Giovanni, Jacques Deray
actors: Karlheinz Böhm, Charles Vanel, Barbara Lass
plot: Van Ekken, an old gangster, arrives in Tokyo to direct a bank hold-up, to get a very valuable diamond, so big it's named Titan. Riquet was to be his second-in-command, but a rival gang shoots him down before the big day. Marsen, R...
